_meta.hint: rdl-long quality 50<85; 词数 1/2 — R1 email ran 131 words (under target). This supplement is a single long item firmly inside the 140-200 word band.

items.subtopic: maker studio new hours and fees

format_metadata.title: New Hours and Fees for the Maker Studio

items.text:
NOTICE: New Hours and Fees for the Maker Studio
Effective Monday, October 6

The Maker Studio in Brandt Hall, Room 210, will begin a new fall schedule next week. The studio gives students access to 3D printers, laser cutters, and sewing machines for both class projects and personal work.

Updated hours are 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM on weekdays and 12:00 PM to 5:00 PM on Saturdays. The studio is closed on Sundays.

Please note the following:
- A valid student ID must be scanned at the front desk before each visit.
- 3D printing now costs $0.15 per gram of filament, payable through the campus portal.
- A staff member must approve any laser-cutter job before it begins.
- Personal materials are welcome, though supplies may also be purchased on site.

Walk-ins are accepted, but reserving a machine in advance is strongly encouraged during midterm weeks. To book a slot or ask about training sessions, please email makerstudio@brandt.edu or stop by the help desk on the second floor.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what must students do before each visit to the studio?

options.A: Scan a valid student ID at the front desk
options.B: Pay a refundable deposit for each machine
options.C: Complete an online safety quiz in advance
options.D: Reserve a printing slot through the portal

questions.explanation: The notice states that a valid student ID must be scanned at the front desk before each visit.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about reserving a machine in advance?

options.A: It is required for every studio visit
options.B: It guarantees a lower printing fee
options.C: It is most useful when demand is high
options.D: It can only be arranged by email

questions.explanation: Reserving is strongly encouraged during midterm weeks, implying it is especially helpful when many students want machines.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this notice?

options.A: To announce a new campus printing club
options.B: To inform students of the studio's new hours and fees
options.D: To recruit volunteers for the Maker Studio

questions.explanation: The notice's overall purpose is to inform students of the Maker Studio's new schedule and fee structure.
